0px;"><font style="font-size: 20px;">REST / HTTP</font></h1><p>Request/response</p><p>Stateless</p><p>Good for: CRUD, file uploads, history fetch</p><p>Cacheble</p><p>User for: auth, user profile, group management, fetching old messages</p>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="220" width="270" x="-582" y="2640" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" parent="1" 0px;"><font style="font-size: 20px;">Websocket</font></h1><p>Persistence Connection</p><p>Statefull</p><p>Good for: Real time, presence, typing indicators</p><p>Not Cacheble</p><p>User for: live messages, delivery receipts, online status</p>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="220" width="270" x="-256" y="2640" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" parent="1"
